movie.actors: Gerard Butler, Lena Headey, Dominic West, David Wenham
movie.plot: King Leonidas of Sparta and a force of 300 men fight the Persians at Thermopylae in 480 B.C.
movie.writer: Zack Snyder (screenplay), Kurt Johnstad (screenplay), Michael B. Gordon (screenplay), Frank Miller (graphic novel), Lynn Varley (graphic novel)
